fields.Name: Search Query Catalog
fields.Description: Searches the saved query catalog using vector-based semantic search. Takes a natural language description of what data is needed and returns ranked matching queries with similarity scores. Use this to find existing queries before writing ad-hoc SQL.

fields.Name: SearchText
fields.Description: Natural language description of what data you need. Match by business concept, not exact query names. For example: 'monthly revenue by region' or 'active customers with recent orders'.

fields.Name: TopK
fields.Description: Maximum number of matching queries to return. Default: 10.

fields.Name: MinSimilarity
fields.Description: Minimum similarity score (0-1) for results. Lower values return more results. Default: 0.3.

fields.Name: ReusableOnly
fields.Description: If true, only return queries marked as Reusable (for composition via {{query:"..."}} syntax). Default: false.

fields.Name: ApprovedOnly
fields.Description: If true, only return queries with Status='Approved'. Default: true.

fields.Name: IncludeSQL
fields.Description: If true, include the SQL text of each matching query in results. Useful for composition planning. Default: false.

fields.Name: Results
fields.Description: Array of matching queries with QueryID, Name, Description, Category, Similarity score, Status, Reusable flag, and optionally SQL.
Found one or more matching queries in the catalog.
Search completed but no queries matched the criteria. Proceed with ad-hoc SQL.
SearchText parameter is required but was not provided.
Failed to generate embedding for the search text or load query embeddings.
